hierarchy.h1: text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-none text-primary font-serif
hierarchy.label: text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-muted-foreground font-semibold font-sans

surfaces.ai_council_card: bg-[#0B192C] border border-[#C5A059]/30 shadow-lg rounded-xl text-white

components.button_primary: bg-[#0B192C] text-white hover:bg-[#0B192C]/90 px-6 py-3 rounded-md font-medium transition-all
components.button_accent: bg-[#C5A059] text-white hover:bg-[#b08d4b] px-6 py-3 rounded-md font-medium transition-all shadow-md shadow-[#C5A059]/20
components.input: bg-white border border-gray-300 focus:border-[#C5A059] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#C5A059] rounded-md px-4 py-3 text-primary
components.badge: bg-gray-100 text-[#0B192C] border border-gray-200 px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs font-semibold tracking-wide

hero_background.description: Abstract justice statue with sword, deep dark tones.

supreme_court.description: White concrete structure symbolizing the supreme court.

law_books.description: Old law books on a shelf.

professional_lawyer.description: Professional sitting in office, to be used for judge/bias intelligence placeholder.

icons.instruction: Use lucide-react for all interface icons (Scale, Gavel, User, FileText, Map, Shield, Mic). Keep stroke-width to 1.5 for a premium feel.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use a stark white (#FFFFFF) and off-white (#F8F9FA) canvas with striking deep navy (#0B192C) blocks to create tension and authority. This is a LIGHT theme that heavily utilizes dark contrasting elements.

Implement the 5-member AI Legal Council using the bento grid system: 4 smaller dark navy cards for Prosecution, Defense, Scholar, and Bias Detector, and 1 massive spanning card for the Chief Justice Synthesis. These cards must have a 1px gold border (border-[#C5A059]/30) for a jewel/premium feel.
Use 'Cormorant Garamond' for all headings to evoke legal authority, paired with 'IBM Plex Sans' for data density and readability. Make sure to load these from Google Fonts.

The CNR search should be a massive, dominant element at the top, perhaps housed in a deep navy hero block with the 'hero_background' image at 20% opacity. Include a prominent gold mic icon button for Sarvam AI voice input next to the search bar.
For the Judicial Bias Intelligence and Similar Cases, use flat, crisp, white cards with sharp edges and 1px borders to maintain a highly technical, objective look.
Implement standard data-testids for all interactive elements (e.g., data-testid='cnr-submit-btn', data-testid='voice-input-btn', data-testid='council-deliberation-view').
Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Always ensure strong contrast ratios (e.g., White text on #0B192C).
Avoid generic Tailwind shadows. Use precise, crisp borders and subtle dropshadows only on hover.
Ensure all Shadcn components (Tables, Inputs, Dialogs) are customized to match the Navy/Gold/White color palette and sharp border-radius.
